text: If a text contains words like broken, useless, terrible, or not working, it often indicates negative or frustrated sentiment.
If a text contains words like urgent, asap, immediately, or critical, it often indicates urgent sentiment.
If a text contains thanks, appreciate, great job, or helpful, it often indicates positive sentiment.
If a text contains both praise and complaint, it may indicate mixed sentiment.
Frustrated sentiment is stronger than ordinary negative sentiment and often includes repeated complaints, dissatisfaction, or emotional intensity.
